scripts.deploy:testnet: mkdir -p .hardhat-home .hardhat-config && HOME=$PWD/.hardhat-home XDG_CONFIG_HOME=$PWD/.hardhat-config hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network xlayerTestnet
scripts.deploy:mainnet: mkdir -p .hardhat-home .hardhat-config && HOME=$PWD/.hardhat-home XDG_CONFIG_HOME=$PWD/.hardhat-config hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network xlayer
